# Elad Yaakobovitch — Full-Stack Developer + AI Network Operator

> Hebrew/English bilingual site of Elad Yaakobovitch — a full-stack dev who builds and operates a 13-agent AI microservice network on a self-hosted VPS.

## Core pages
- [About](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/about): Background, philosophy, AI workflow
- [Services](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/services): 5 core services with pricing
- [Projects](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/projects): Showcase of full-stack and AI projects
- [Contact](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/contact): WhatsApp, email, contact form

## Agent guides (Hebrew, original work)
- [Claude Code](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/claude-code): Anthropic's terminal coding agent
- [Kami](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/kami): WhatsApp-based personal AI agent
- [Kaylee](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/kaylee): Telegram-based work agent on OpenClaw
- [Box](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/box): Personal coach agent (nutrition, fitness, mind)
- [Hermes](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/hermes): Multi-agent orchestration CLI
- [Delegator](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/delegator): Single-entry agent router (port 3900)
- [Adopter](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/adopter): Autonomous content discovery + integration
- [Dashboard](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/dashboard): 12-tab control center for the network
- [CrewAI](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/crewai): Multi-agent crews framework
- [Qdrant](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/qdrant): Vector database for agent memory
- [Docker](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/docker): Containerization for self-hosted services
- [Ollama](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/ollama): Local LLM runtime
- [n8n](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/n8n): Visual workflow automation
- [Aider](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/guide/aider): Pair-programming AI in the terminal

## Optional
- [Blog](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/blog): Articles on AI, full-stack dev, agent architectures
- [English version](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/en/claude-code): Selected guides in English

## Machine-readable capabilities (for AI agents)
- [MCP-style skills + guides + posts JSON](https://fullstack-eladjak.co.il/api/mcp/skills): Single JSON endpoint listing skills, guides, blog posts, services, and the agent network. CORS-open. Cache 5 min.
